verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We will darw near to You, Jesus, we hear You calling. There is no fear There in Your perfect love. We will draw near to You Knowing that as we do You will draw near, You will draw near to us.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We want to be like Mary Who found the better part. We want to be like John Who laid his head upon Your heart. We are not content To worship from afar, Draw us near to Your heart, Oh God. (You will draw near, You will draw near to us.)
